flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Oklahoma-Norman Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Oklahoma-Norman Campus are 40% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.1k vs $44.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Oklahoma-Norman Campus fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.0k → $9.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Oklahoma-Norman Campus rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (50.2% → 57.5%).
